fields.name: document_type
fields.description: Kind of document, e.g. report, article, invoice, contract, manual

fields.name: author_or_publisher
fields.description: Person or organization that wrote or published the document

fields.name: date
fields.description: Publication or creation date mentioned in the document

fields.name: subject
fields.description: Main topic of the document in a few words

fields.name: summary
fields.description: One-sentence summary of what the document is about
